introSection: Clown Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently operating at Camel Creek Adventure Park in Tredinnick, Cornwall, England, UK.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has an oval layout with a single clown-shaped train which passes through a giant drum themed tunnel.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Originally, the coaster was painted entirely white. It was repainted red with black supports. At Camel Creek, the ride has green track and creme supports.

fullText:
Clown Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently operating at Camel Creek Adventure Park in Tredinnick, Cornwall, England, UK.

The ride has an oval layout with a single clown-shaped train which passes through a giant drum themed tunnel.

Originally, the coaster was painted entirely white. It was repainted red with black supports. At Camel Creek, the ride has green track and creme supports.
